commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=c994a3097353100f08633fc6e297942969b68d72)
commands.review_summary:
The PR refactors ClawSweeper PR review comments by replacing separate rating/proof sections with a compact Merge readiness section and moving labels, evidence, workflow notes, and PR surface details into collapsible blocks.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection of the PR head shows the visible Real behavior proof section is replaced by Merge readiness, while the new readiness block only reports a short proof-blocked result and omits the existing proof instructions.
commands.review_followup: Do not request an automated repair marker while the external PR still needs real behavior proof from the contributor.

target.title: fix: Refactor PR review comment layout
target.body:
## Summary
- compress PR review freshness into the verdict line
- replace visible PR rating/proof blocks with a compact Merge readiness section
- move labels, evidence, rank explanations, workflow notes, and PR surface stats into focused collapsibles

## What stayed unchanged
- proof, rating, label, finding, marker, and sync semantics are unchanged
- audit content such as What I checked is still rendered, now under Evidence reviewed

## Verification
- node_modules/.bin/tsgo -p tsconfig.json
- node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/clawsweeper.ts test/clawsweeper.test.ts
- node --test test/clawsweeper.test.ts
- /Users/takayukihoffman/github.com/openclaw/clawsweeper/node_modules/.bin/oxlint src/clawsweeper.ts test/clawsweeper.test.ts --deny-warnings --report-unused-disable-directives -D correctness
- git diff --check
target.author: takhoffman

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
